description: Triggered when the user wants to integrate a headless CMS (Sanity, Strapi, Contentful) into a Next.js app, set up content schemas, write GROQ queries, or implement draft/preview mode.
should_trigger: Set up Sanity CMS in my Next.js app and fetch blog posts
Write a GROQ query to get posts by category with related posts
How do I implement Sanity preview/draft mode in Next.js?
Connect Strapi to my Next.js frontend with ISR caching
Set up Contentful with preview client for draft content
Create a Sanity schema for a blog post with rich text body
should_not_trigger: Set up Payload CMS with multi-tenancy for our platform
How do I configure WordPress REST API with Next.js?
Create a contact form that saves to a MongoDB database
How do I implement a custom admin dashboard?
